heading: Liability for acts of officers and agents
label: 130310 Liability for acts of officers and agents
text: The corporation is liable for the acts of its officers and agents acting within the scope of their authority.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)13031036:641., .Aug. 4, 1955, ch. 546, § 1169 Stat. 489
